tool_input.command: ls -la /Users/tk/Code/tk-agent-team/.claude/ /Users/tk/Code/tk-agent-team/logs/ 2>&1; echo "---"; file /Users/tk/Code/tk-agent-team/files.zip; echo "---"; unzip -l /Users/tk/Code/tk-agent-team/files.zip 2>&1 | head -40

\
mkdir -p mcp-servers/agent-substrate/src/agent_substrate && \
mkdir -p mcp-servers/agent-substrate/tests && \
git mv 2>/dev/null schema.py storage.py server.py __init__.py __main__.py mcp-servers/agent-substrate/src/agent_substrate/ 2>/dev/null || \
mv schema.py storage.py server.py __init__.py __main__.py mcp-servers/agent-substrate/src/agent_substrate/ && \
mv test_agent_substrate.py mcp-servers/agent-substrate/tests/ && \
mv pyproject.toml mcp-servers/agent-substrate/ && \
mv uv.lock mcp-servers/agent-substrate/ && \
mv README.md mcp-servers/agent-substrate/ && \
mv .venv mcp-servers/agent-substrate/ && \
mv files.zip mcp-servers/agent-substrate/files.zip.bak && \
echo "--- after move ---" && \
ls -la && \
echo "--- mcp-servers/agent-substrate/ ---" && \
ls -la mcp-servers/agent-substrate/ && \
echo "--- mcp-servers/agent-substrate/src/agent_substrate/ ---" && \
ls mcp-servers/agent-substrate/src/agent_substrate/ && \
echo "--- mcp-servers/agent-substrate/tests/ ---" && \
ls mcp-servers/agent-substrate/tests/

cd /Users/tk/Code/tk-agent-team/mcp-servers/agent-substrate && \
  .venv/bin/python -m pip install -e ".[dev]" --quiet 2>&1 | tail -20 && \
  echo "--- pytest ---" && \
  .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q 2>&1 | tail -25
tool_input.description: Reinstall package at new layout and run pytest
